name: Wellness Exam
description: Comprehensive annual health check covering physical examination vaccinations review parasite screening and personalised health advice for your pet.

name: Vaccinations
description: Core and lifestyle vaccinations to keep your pet protected against preventable diseases. We tailor the vaccination schedule to your pet's age breed and lifestyle.

name: Dental Cleaning
description: Professional teeth cleaning under anaesthesia to remove plaque and tartar buildup preventing periodontal disease and improving overall health.

name: Emergency Care
description: 24/7 emergency and critical care services for life-threatening situations. Our team is always ready to provide immediate life-saving treatment.

name: Spay & Neuter
description: Safe routine surgical procedures to prevent unwanted pregnancies and reduce the risk of certain cancers and behavioural issues.

name: Orthopaedic Surgery
description: Specialist surgery for bone and joint conditions including fractures cruciate ligament tears and hip dysplasia in dogs and cats.

name: Dermatology Consultation
description: Expert diagnosis and management of skin conditions allergies and coat disorders. Includes allergy testing and long-term treatment planning.

name: Digital X-Ray
description: High-resolution digital radiography for accurate diagnosis of bone joint chest and abdominal conditions with immediate results.

name: Ultrasound Imaging
description: Non-invasive diagnostic imaging to evaluate internal organs detect tumours assess pregnancy and guide biopsies or aspirates.

name: Nutrition Counselling
description: Personalised dietary assessment and nutritional guidance to optimise your pet's weight energy and long-term health outcomes.
